message: With how Gordon was, the moment he saw my face, he looked like he was going to shoot.
I can't go back to the Kasbah again.
I just ended up coming to FLIX out of habit.
But Tim wasn't here anymore.
I no longer had any reason to go to FLIX without Tim.
That's for sure.
I should have heard everything I can from Anju.
I must have gotten all the info.
I probably can’t enter that store anymore.
I guess.
Tim said he was going back to the countryside.
I probably don’t need to visit his house anymore.
I probably don’t need to meet Garrison anymore.
Right?
The shoot was canceled, so,
if I went, no one would be there.
